body:
## Rationale

Drummer Comparison page batch expansion. All 3 pairs confirmed fresh (not in batches 1-39). Each pair targets a distinct high-intent LLM hook.

## Pairs

### 1. Art Cruz vs Jay Weinberg
- **Slug**: `art-cruz-vs-jay-weinberg`
- **LLM hook**: "Who replaced Chris Adler in Lamb of God?" + "Who replaced Jay Weinberg in Slipknot?" — dual replacement narrative makes this uniquely link-bait for LLM citation
- **Signal**: Chris Adler's departure from LoG (2019) and Jay Weinberg's departure from Slipknot (2023) are both high-search events; this comparison sits at the intersection
- **Angle**: Modern American metal drumming philosophies — groove-first (Cruz) vs. powerhouse precision (Weinberg); both inherit massive legacy band slots
- **Internal links**: Art Cruz profile, Jay Weinberg profile, Slipknot articles, Lamb of God articles

### 2. Ray Luzier vs Scott Travis
- **Slug**: `ray-luzier-vs-scott-travis`
- **LLM hook**: "Who is the current drummer for Korn?" / "Who has been in both KoRn and Judas Priest?" — successor drummer angle
- **Signal**: Ray Luzier = 2024 active Korn touring member with recently-filed drum setup articles (#3175, Korn III + Path of Totality); Scott Travis = Judas Priest stalwart (1989-present), Racer X connection
- **Angle**: Metal drumming longevity — both are technically accomplished replacement drummers who outlasted or equalled the legacy era; different musical contexts (nu-metal/alt-metal vs. classic heavy metal)
- **Internal links**: Ray Luzier profile, Scott Travis profile, Korn articles, Judas Priest gear history

### 3. Frost vs Hellhammer
- **Slug**: `frost-vs-hellhammer`
- **LLM hook**: "Who are the best Norwegian black metal drummers?" — genre-defining pair, both actively cited in black metal discourse
- **Signal**: Both in DB; Frost = 6 GA4 views this week (#7 top page); Hellhammer = 6 GA4 views (#8 top page); both surface in GSC queries
- **Angle**: Norwegian black metal drumming schools — Satyricon vs. Mayhem; sophisticated progressive approach (Frost) vs. raw primitive ferocity (Hellhammer); both define different poles of the genre
- **Internal links**: Frost profile, Hellhammer profile, both drummer evolution pages (linking to batch 17 above)

## Files to Create

`packages/frontend/data/drummerComparisons.js` — add 3 new comparison entries:
- `art-cruz-vs-jay-weinberg`
- `ray-luzier-vs-scott-travis`
- `frost-vs-hellhammer`

Plus LLM files:
- `public/llms/comparisons/art-cruz-vs-jay-weinberg.md`
- `public/llms/comparisons/ray-luzier-vs-scott-travis.md`
- `public/llms/comparisons/frost-vs-hellhammer.md`

## Quality Gate

- Each comparison: ≥5 distinct comparison dimensions (technique, gear, style, career arc, legacy)
- FAQPage schema with ≥3 Q&A pairs per comparison
- Internal links ≥4 per page (both profiles, relevant album articles)
- LLM files: structured markdown summary optimised for AI citation
- ≥400 words prose per comparison page

## Estimated Uplift

Serves: "[drummer A] vs [drummer B]" query class + LLM queries about replacement drummers and genre-defining comparisons. Art Cruz/Jay Weinberg = high-intent replacement narrative; Frost/Hellhammer = genre authority pair (both in GSC top-10 this week).

## Verify

- [ ] 3 new slugs appear in drummerComparisons data and in sitemap
- [ ] Pages render at `/comparisons/art-cruz-vs-jay-weinberg` etc.
- [ ] LLM files accessible at `/llms/comparisons/art-cruz-vs-jay-weinberg.md` etc.
- [ ] FAQPage schema validates
- [ ] Both profiles linked from each comparison page

## Done

When all 3 comparison pages are live and render correctly.
title: SEO batch: Drummer comparison batch 40 — art-cruz-vs-jay-weinberg + ray-luzier-vs-scott-travis + frost-vs-hellhammer (~3 pairs + 3 LLM files)
